name: dexvra-bot
description: Dexvra Telegram bot — Listing / Xpress / Trending / Banner packages with on-chain payment and auto-posting to channels + X.
comment_overrides: Pin rpc-websockets' uuid to a CommonJS build. @solana/web3.js → rpc-websockets pulls uuid@14 (ESM-only), which crashes require() on Node < 22.12 with ERR_REQUIRE_ESM. uuid@9.0.1 exposes a CJS require entry; the v4 API used by rpc-websockets is unchanged.
